entry.title: New: BILL060(24) (Honolulu) — PUBLISH
entry.content:
TO AMEND CHAPTER 43 OF THE REVISED ORDINANCES OF HONOLULU 2021, RELATING TO SEWERS, DRAINAGE, AND CESSPOOLS.

Amends various sections and appendices of ROH Chapter 43 to include Accessory Dwelling Units as a sewer customer classification; update sewer service charges and wastewater system facility charges, including an automatic 3 percent annual increase beginning fiscal year 2033 for sewer service charges and fiscal year 2032 for wastewater system facility charges; add wastewater disposal charges for sewer customers; remove references to extra strength wastewater; establish a customer assistance program within the ENV to provide relief to households paying residential sewer charges; and to allow the ENV Director or the Director's authorized representative to adopt rules to implement and administer the customer assistance program. The revised charges commence on January 1, 2026 and the repeal of certain provisions in Ordinance 25-2 takes effect upon approval.

Latest action: Final reading notice published in the Honolulu Star-Advertiser.

View on the council site
